formulas.latex: \left\{\begin{matrix} v_{k}^{\left(p\right)} \left(s_{f}^{\left(p\right)}\right) = v_{k}^{\left(p + 1\right)} \left(s_{0}^{\left(p + 1\right)}\right) \\ t_{k}^{\left(p\right)} \left(s_{f}^{\left(p\right)}\right) = t_{k}^{\left(p + 1\right)} \left(s_{0}^{\left(p + 1\right)}\right) \end{matrix}\right \forall p \in \mathbf{\mathit{P}} : p + 1 \leq P , \forall k \in K_{p} .

formulas.latex: \begin{matrix}\omega_{1} \times \left(\underset{k \in K}{\sum} \sum_{\left(i , t , u , j , t^{'} , u^{'}\right) \in A_{k}} c_{\mathit{ituj} t^{'} u^{'}}^{k} \times x_{i , t , u , j , t^{'} , u^{'}}^{k}\right) + \omega_{2} \times \left(\underset{k \in K}{\sum} \sum_{\left(i , t , u , j , t^{'} , u^{'}\right) \in A_{k}} \left(\bar{c}\right)_{\mathit{ituj} t^{'} u^{'}}^{k} \times x_{i , t , u , j , t^{'} , u^{'}}^{k}\right) \\ + \underset{\left(i , t , j , t^{'}\right)}{\sum} \sum_{k \in K} \mu_{i , t , j , t^{'}}^{k} \left(\underset{k^{'} \in K}{\sum} \underset{\left(i , t , u , j , t^{'} , u^{'}\right) \in A_{k^{'}}}{\sum} x_{i , t , u , j , t^{'} , u^{'}}^{k^{'}} + \underset{\left(i , \tau , u , j , \tau^{'} , u^{'}\right) \in \psi \left(i , t , j , t^{'}\right)}{\sum} x_{i , \tau , u , j , \tau^{'} , u^{'}}^{k} - 1\right) +\end{matrix}

formulas.latex: \begin{matrix}min: Z_{k} = \omega_{1} \times \left(\sum_{\left(i , t , u , j , t^{'} , u^{'}\right) \in A_{k}} c_{\mathit{ituj} t^{'} u^{'}}^{k} \times x_{i , t , u , j , t^{'} , u^{'}}^{k}\right) + \omega_{2} \times \left(\sum_{\left(i , t , u , j , t^{'} , u^{'}\right) \in A_{k}} \left(\bar{c}\right)_{\mathit{ituj} t^{'} u^{'}}^{k} \times x_{i , t , u , j , t^{'} , u^{'}}^{k}\right) + \\ \sum_{\left(i , t , j , t^{'}\right)} \mu_{i , t , j , t^{'}}^{k} \times \sum_{k^{'} \in K} \sum_{\left(i , t , u , j , t^{'} , u^{'}\right) \in A_{k^{'}}} x_{i , t , u , j , t^{'} , u^{'}}^{k^{'}} + \sum_{\left(i , t , j , t^{'}\right)} \mu_{i , t , j , t^{'}}^{k} \sum_{\left(i , \tau , u , j , \tau^{'} , u^{'}\right) \in \psi \left(i , t , j , t^{'}\right)} x_{i , \tau , u , j , \tau^{'} , u^{'}}^{k} + \frac{\rho_{1}}{2} \times \underset{\left(i , t , j , t^{'}\right)}{\sum} \left(2 \vartheta_{i , t , j , t^{'}}^{k} - 1\right) \times x_{i , t , u , j , t^{'} , u^{'}}^{k} + \\ \underset{i \in S}{\sum} \sum_{t \in T} \pi_{i}^{t} \times \left(\underset{\tau \in T}{\sum} \underset{\left(i , \tau , 0 , i , t^{'} , 0\right) \in A_{k}}{\sum} x_{i , \tau , 0 , i , t^{'} , 0}^{k} + \underset{\left(i , t , u , j , t^{'} , u^{'}\right) \in A_{k}}{\sum} x_{i , t , u , j , t^{'} , u^{'}}^{k}\right) + \frac{\rho_{2}}{2} \times \underset{i \in S}{\sum} \sum_{t \in T} \left(2 \varphi_{i , t}^{k} - 2 C_{i} + 1\right) \times x_{i , t , u , j , t^{'} , u^{'}}^{k} \\ = \left(\hat{c}\right)_{\mathit{ituj} t^{'} u^{'}}^{k} \times x_{i , t , u , j , t^{'} , u^{'}}^{k}\end{matrix}

formulas.label: e0170
formulas.latex: \begin{matrix}\omega_{1} \times \left(\underset{k \in K}{\sum} \sum_{\left(i , t , u , j , t^{'} , u^{'}\right) \in A_{k}} c_{\mathit{ituj} t^{'} u^{'}}^{k} \times x_{i , t , u , j , t^{'} , u^{'}}^{k}\right) + \omega_{2} \times \left(\underset{k \in K}{\sum} \sum_{\left(i , t , u , j , t^{'} , u^{'}\right) \in A_{k}} \left(\bar{c}\right)_{\mathit{ituj} t^{'} u^{'}}^{k} \times x_{i , t , u , j , t^{'} , u^{'}}^{k}\right) \\ + \underset{\left(i , t , j , t^{'}\right)}{\sum} \sum_{k \in K} \mu_{i , t , j , t^{'}}^{k} \left(\underset{k^{'} \in K}{\sum} \underset{\left(i , t , u , j , t^{'} , u^{'}\right) \in A_{k^{'}}}{\sum} x_{i , t , u , j , t^{'} , u^{'}}^{k^{'}} + \underset{\left(i , \tau , u , j , \tau^{'} , u^{'}\right) \in \psi \left(i , t , j , t^{'}\right)}{\sum} x_{i , \tau , u , j , \tau^{'} , u^{'}}^{k} - 1\right) \\ + \underset{i \in S}{\sum} \sum_{t \in T} \pi_{i}^{t} \left(\underset{k \in K}{\sum} \underset{\tau \in T}{\sum} \underset{\left(i , \tau , 0 , i , t^{'} , 0\right) \in A_{k}}{\sum} x_{i , \tau , 0 , i , t^{'} , 0}^{k} + \underset{k \in K}{\sum} \underset{\left(i , t , u , j , t^{'} , u^{'}\right) \in A_{k}}{\sum} x_{i , t , u , j , t^{'} , u^{'}}^{k} - C_{i}\right)\end{matrix}

formulas.label: e0175
formulas.latex: \begin{matrix}Z_{k}^{\mathit{LR}} = \omega_{1} \times \left(\sum_{\left(i , t , u , j , t^{'} , u^{'}\right) \in A_{k}} c_{\mathit{ituj} t^{'} u^{'}}^{k} \times x_{i , t , u , j , t^{'} , u^{'}}^{k}\right) + \omega_{2} \times \left(\sum_{\left(i , t , u , j , t^{'} , u^{'}\right) \in A_{k}} \left(\bar{c}\right)_{\mathit{ituj} t^{'} u^{'}}^{k} \times x_{i , t , u , j , t^{'} , u^{'}}^{k}\right) \\ + \underset{\left(i , t , j , t^{'}\right)}{\sum} \mu_{i , t , j , t^{'}}^{k} \times \underset{k^{'} \in K}{\sum} \underset{\left(i , t , u , j , t^{'} , u^{'}\right) \in A_{k^{'}}}{\sum} x_{i , t , u , j , t^{'} , u^{'}}^{k^{'}} + \underset{\left(i , t , j , t^{'}\right)}{\sum} \mu_{i , t , j , t^{'}}^{k} \underset{\left(i , \tau , u , j , \tau^{'} , u^{'}\right) \in \psi \left(i , t , j , t^{'}\right)}{\sum} x_{i , \tau , u , j , \tau^{'} , u^{'}}^{k} \\ + \underset{i \in S}{\sum} \sum_{t \in T} \pi_{i}^{t} \times \left(\underset{\tau \in T}{\sum} \underset{\left(i , \tau , 0 , i , t^{'} , 0\right) \in A_{k}}{\sum} x_{i , \tau , 0 , i , t^{'} , 0}^{k} + \underset{\left(i , t , u , j , t^{'} , u^{'}\right) \in A_{k}}{\sum} x_{i , t , u , j , t^{'} , u^{'}}^{k}\right) = \left(\overset{}{c}\right)_{\mathit{ituj} t^{'} u^{'}}^{k} \times x_{i , t , u , j , t^{'} , u^{'}}^{k}\end{matrix}
